title: Garlic Tandoori Keto-Friendly Bruschetta
description: A nutty and tender keto-friendly French dish featuring garlic, tandoor spices, ideal as a hangover-cure in the morning.
instructions: Slice the keto bread into rounds and lightly toast them in a pan over medium heat for about 1-2 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, crush 3 garlic cloves and mix with tandoori paste, salt, and paprika. Spread this mixture evenly on each slice of toasted bread to ensure an even layer.
Let the bruschetta cool slightly before serving as a snack or light breakfast option.
